note: GroundedProposer.__init__ (adding tip_weights param); tip-selection block in propose_instructions_for_program (lines ~360-371, where set_tip_randomly picks selected_tip_key/selected_tip); adding new helper method _select_tip_with_weights()

type: SURVEY
files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Feature: remove temperature modulation in GenerateModuleInstruction.propose_instruction_for_predictor (delete original_temp/epsilon/modified_temp block); add GroundedProposer._cache_salt(pred_i, demo_set_i) method; add cache_salt InputField to DescribeProgram, DescribeModule, and generate_instruction_class's GenerateSingleModuleInstruction signatures; thread cache_salt through GenerateModuleInstruction.forward (describe_program/describe_module/generate_module_instruction calls) and propose_instruction_for_predictor -> instruction_generator call.

type: AGREE
files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: No overlapping constructs found: your edits are in propose_instruction_for_predictor (temp/epsilon removal, cache_salt threading) and new _cache_salt method plus DescribeProgram/DescribeModule/GenerateSingleModuleInstruction signatures. Mine are in __init__ (tip_weights param), the tip-selection block in propose_instructions_for_program (lines ~360-371), and a new _select_tip_with_weights method. Proceeding to implement independently.

type: DRAFT
files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
region: overlap-check
code: N/A - no shared code
note: Comparing surveys: your edits are __init__ (add tip_weights param), the tip-selection block ~lines 360-371 inside propose_instructions_for_program, and new _select_tip_with_weights() helper. Mine are: propose_instruction_for_predictor (delete original_temp/epsilon/modified_temp block, add cache_salt computation + pass to instruction_generator call), new _cache_salt(self, pred_i, demo_set_i) helper, GenerateModuleInstruction.forward (thread cache_salt into describe_program/describe_module/generate_module_instruction calls), and cache_salt InputField added to DescribeProgram, DescribeModule, and the GenerateSingleModuleInstruction signature inside generate_instruction_class. No shared lines/functions -> no joint draft needed. To avoid diff-anchor collisions from both of us inserting new methods near the same spot: I will place _cache_salt() immediately before propose_instruction_for_predictor (i.e. right after propose_instructions_for_program ends). Suggest you place _select_tip_with_weights() near the top of the class (e.g. right after __init__) or anywhere inside/above propose_instructions_for_program, away from that boundary. Let me know if that works, otherwise reply with your preferred placement.

type: DONE
files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Implemented cache_salt feature: removed temperature modulation in propose_instruction_for_predictor, added GroundedProposer._cache_salt(pred_i, demo_set_i), added cache_salt InputField to DescribeProgram/DescribeModule/GenerateSingleModuleInstruction, threaded cache_salt through GenerateModuleInstruction.forward and propose_instruction_for_predictor. Did not touch __init__, tip-selection block, or propose_instructions_for_program body (aside from unrelated context lines). Ready for you to layer your tip_weights changes.

type: AGREE
